application.description: Selecting the date and time will confirm your exit inspection schedule.

modifyCooldown.title: Inspection time under 1 hour, modifications unavailable

notice.description: Scroll down to review all important notices.

items.0: If you are not in your room on your registered time, the checking will be cancelled.
items.1: Make sure to prepare before your examination time.
items.2: Make sure to take out all of your loads before the moving-out checking.
items.3: Make sure to clean all the trash and take it to the 1st floor spaces for putting garbage.
items.4: You should do re-checking until it's literally passed.
items.5: However you are unable to apply room-checking process due to the personal reasons or not, it is samely treated as not passing the checking process.
items.6: There will be penalty points if you couldn't pass the checking process.
items.7: There will be additional penalty for bad cleaning room states(Just for the students that could not passed for the checking).
items.8: You can apply for the re-checking through this site again!
items.9: The moving-out inspection is only available three times in total, and if you do not pass the moving-out inspection for three times, the moving-out inspection will be non-fulfillment.
items.10: You can change your inspection schedule at least 1 hour before of the inspection time, and cancellations made within 1 hour of the inspection time will be treated as a no-show.
items.11: If a problem arises, penalty points will be assessed according to the "University Dormitory Rules." The "University Dormitory Rules" can be found on the GIST Portal - Manual/Regulations - Academic Support Team - University Dormitory Rules..

notice.title: Please check the precautions

error.notFound: The inspection schedule information could not be found.
error.notStartedOrEnded: It is currently not within the inspection application period.
error.ownerCanCancel: Only the applicant can cancel the inspection schedule.

application.title: Please select the inspection date

application.description: Please apply for the inspection using the button below.

failed.description: Please check the reasons below and apply again.
failed.title: Re-inspection Required

in_progress.description: The RA is currently inspecting your room. Please check the results in a moment.

not_period.description: The next inspection application starts from {{startTime}}.
not_period.title: It is not the moving out inspection period.

not_target.description: If you have any questions, please click the "Contact Us" button below.
not_target.title: You are not eligible to apply for a move-out inspection.

passed.description: All procedures have been completed. Thank you for your cooperation.
passed.title: Moving Out Inspection Passed

cancel.description: If you cancel within 1 hour of the inspection start time, it will be recorded as a no-show and one inspection attempt will be deducted.
cancel.title: Do you want to cancel the inspection?
